fmiModelDescription.description: F-16C/D mission computer blending pilot HOTAS inputs with fly-by-wire control laws and stores management.

ScalarVariable.name: autopilotInput.button_mask
ScalarVariable.description: Autopilot command bundle using same HOTAS signal structure.

ScalarVariable.name: autopilotInput.hat_x
ScalarVariable.description: Autopilot command bundle using same HOTAS signal structure.

ScalarVariable.name: autopilotInput.hat_y
ScalarVariable.description: Autopilot command bundle using same HOTAS signal structure.

ScalarVariable.name: autopilotInput.mode_switch
ScalarVariable.description: Autopilot command bundle using same HOTAS signal structure.

ScalarVariable.name: autopilotInput.reserved
ScalarVariable.description: Autopilot command bundle using same HOTAS signal structure.

ScalarVariable.name: autopilotInput.rudder_norm
ScalarVariable.description: Autopilot command bundle using same HOTAS signal structure.

ScalarVariable.name: autopilotInput.stick_pitch_norm
ScalarVariable.description: Autopilot command bundle using same HOTAS signal structure.

ScalarVariable.name: autopilotInput.stick_roll_norm
ScalarVariable.description: Autopilot command bundle using same HOTAS signal structure.

ScalarVariable.name: autopilotInput.throttle_aux_norm
ScalarVariable.description: Autopilot command bundle using same HOTAS signal structure.

ScalarVariable.name: autopilotInput.throttle_norm
ScalarVariable.description: Autopilot command bundle using same HOTAS signal structure.

ScalarVariable.name: direction_command.pitch_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Command how to alter the current velocity vector, pith, yaw, roll

ScalarVariable.name: direction_command.roll_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Command how to alter the current velocity vector, pith, yaw, roll

ScalarVariable.name: direction_command.yaw_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Command how to alter the current velocity vector, pith, yaw, roll

ScalarVariable.name: engineThrottle.afterburner_enable
ScalarVariable.description: Structured throttle/fuel enable command to propulsion.

ScalarVariable.name: engineThrottle.fuel_enable
ScalarVariable.description: Structured throttle/fuel enable command to propulsion.

ScalarVariable.name: engineThrottle.throttle_norm
ScalarVariable.description: Structured throttle/fuel enable command to propulsion.

ScalarVariable.name: fuelStatus.fuel_level_norm
ScalarVariable.description: Fuel telemetry used for command blending and power limiting.

ScalarVariable.name: fuelStatus.fuel_remaining_kg
ScalarVariable.description: Fuel telemetry used for command blending and power limiting.

ScalarVariable.name: fuelStatus.fuel_starved
ScalarVariable.description: Fuel telemetry used for command blending and power limiting.

ScalarVariable.name: manualInput.button_mask
ScalarVariable.description: Manual HOTAS command bundle from cockpit controls.

ScalarVariable.name: manualInput.hat_x
ScalarVariable.description: Manual HOTAS command bundle from cockpit controls.

ScalarVariable.name: manualInput.hat_y
ScalarVariable.description: Manual HOTAS command bundle from cockpit controls.

ScalarVariable.name: manualInput.mode_switch
ScalarVariable.description: Manual HOTAS command bundle from cockpit controls.

ScalarVariable.name: manualInput.reserved
ScalarVariable.description: Manual HOTAS command bundle from cockpit controls.

ScalarVariable.name: manualInput.rudder_norm
ScalarVariable.description: Manual HOTAS command bundle from cockpit controls.

ScalarVariable.name: manualInput.stick_pitch_norm
ScalarVariable.description: Manual HOTAS command bundle from cockpit controls.

ScalarVariable.name: manualInput.stick_roll_norm
ScalarVariable.description: Manual HOTAS command bundle from cockpit controls.

ScalarVariable.name: manualInput.throttle_aux_norm
ScalarVariable.description: Manual HOTAS command bundle from cockpit controls.

ScalarVariable.name: manualInput.throttle_norm
ScalarVariable.description: Manual HOTAS command bundle from cockpit controls.
